title: ghost in Darwin Ambulance Centre resident ghost
publication_or_organisation: Vollie News, 8 August 2013; St John Ambulance Australia (NT)
australian_relation: Public St John Ambulance NT newsletter in Territory Stories naming the Darwin Ambulance Centre on Ross Smith Avenue as having a resident ghost.
coordinate_evidence_note: Vollie News OCR names the Darwin Ambulance Centre on Ross Smith Avenue as having a resident ghost; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Darwin Ambulance Centre result.
evidence_summary: Ghost Story - Part 2. A couple of years ago Vollie News ran a story about the ghost in the old Palmerston Ambulance Centre. The Darwin Ambulance Centre on Ross Smith Avenue also has its resident ghost. Paramedic reports on this story suggested that the ghost was a fiction, although Renee Caldwell-Harris says that it still has taken up residence at Parap Station.
